sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65964" key="meletai/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μελετ-αίνω</orth>, <sense id="n65964.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">take thought for, attend to</tr_>, c. gen., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Mnemos.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">57.208</biblScope> </bibl> (Argos, <date TEIform="date">vi B.
